name: DeliveryGateEscrowController

ironRules.rule: Delivery gate validation BEFORE any funds movement. delivery.status === SUBMITTED required before release. DELIVERY_NOT_SUBMITTED returned if no deliverable.
Release path: storeDocument(milestone, status:RELEASED) ONLY — never deleteDocument on any path.
Dispute path: updateDocument(status:DISPUTED) ONLY — no funds movement on dispute path.
LIFO compensation registered as [REFUND_MILESTONE, RESTORE_GIG_STATUS] forward. Executor runs RESTORE_GIG_STATUS → REFUND_MILESTONE (reversed). CF-17-3.
storeDocument(audit) BEFORE every event emit on both release and dispute paths. DNA-8.
Timer gate-opener reads milestone_auto_release_days from FREEDOM config — never hardcoded.

keywords: delivery gate escrow controller LIFO REFUND_MILESTONE RESTORE_GIG_STATUS MilestoneReleased MilestoneDisputed EscrowCompensationStarted no delete T615 freelancer marketplace
